name: AeroLite Start 13mm
description: Paddle nhe, de danh cho nguoi moi, uu tien kiem soat bong va cam giac de lam quen.

name: CoreDrive Balance 14mm
description: Paddle can bang cong-thu, mat vot rong de giam loi hut bong va de canh bong.

name: SpinEdge Pro 16mm
description: Danh cho nguoi choi trung cap muon tang spin va luc danh khi thi dau phong trao.

name: ControlMax Elite 16mm
description: Paddle mem tay, on dinh trong cac pha dink va reset o khu vuc kitchen.

name: PowerStrike Tour 14mm
description: Paddle cho loi choi tan cong, do nay bong cao, phu hop nguoi co ky thuat tot.

name: CourtPro 40 Outdoor
description: Bong ngoai troi 40 lo, do ben cao, duong bay on dinh trong dieu kien gio vua.

name: SoftBounce 26 Indoor
description: Bong trong nha 26 lo, do nay vua phai, giam tieng on va de kiem soat.

name: QuickStep Court Shoes
description: Giay danh san co do bam tot, ho tro di chuyen ngang va giam nguy co lat co chan.

name: TourPack 6 Paddle Bag
description: Tui dung duoc toi da 6 cay vot, co ngan giu nhiet va ngan rieng cho giay.

name: DryTac Overgrip 3-Pack
description: Overgrip tham hut mo hoi, giam tron tay khi choi trong thoi tiet nong am.

name: TuneWeight Lead Tape
description: Bang dan can chinh do nang dau vot de tang do dam va do on dinh.

name: ClearGuard Protective Glasses
description: Kinh bao ho chong mo hoi bam, uu tien an toan mat khi danh doi toc do cao.
